questions.question: Which is the largest river flowing through Odisha?
questions.explanation: Mahanadi is the largest river flowing through Odisha, passing through key districts and forming the Mahanadi Delta.

questions.question: Which tribal community is primarily found in the Mayurbhanj district of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Santal tribe is predominantly found in Mayurbhanj district, known for their rich cultural heritage.

questions.question: Which famous festival is celebrated to mark the Rath Yatra in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Rath Yatra is a famous festival celebrated mainly at Puri, involving chariot processions of Lord Jagannath.

questions.question: Which is the official language of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odia is the official and most widely spoken language of Odisha.

questions.question: Who was the famous Odia poet known for his work 'Bhagabata'?
questions.explanation: Sarala Das is renowned for translating the Mahabharata into Odia and his devotional poetry.

questions.question: Which dam in Odisha is built on the Mahanadi River?
questions.explanation: Rengali Dam is built on the Mahanadi River and is used for irrigation and hydroelectricity.

questions.question: The ancient city of Kalinga was famous for the campaigns of which emperor?
questions.explanation: Emperor Ashoka is famous for his conquest of Kalinga, which led to his conversion to Buddhism.

questions.question: Which UNESCO World Heritage site is located in India and is famous for its Mughal architecture?
questions.explanation: Taj Mahal in Agra is a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its Mughal architecture.

questions.question: Who was the founder of the Indian National Congress?
questions.explanation: A.O. Hume was one of the founders of the Indian National Congress in 1885.

questions.question: Which dance form originated in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odissi is a classical dance form that originated in Odisha.

questions.question: Which physical feature is most prominent in the eastern part of India?
questions.explanation: The Eastern Coastal Plain is prominent in eastern India, along the Bay of Bengal.

questions.question: The climate of Odisha can be classified as?
questions.explanation: Odisha experiences a tropical monsoon climate with heavy rainfall during monsoon season.

questions.question: Which soil type is most common in inland Odisha?
questions.explanation: Laterite soil is common in inland Odisha, especially in hilly regions.

questions.question: Odisha is rich in which mineral?
questions.explanation: Odisha has abundant mineral resources, especially rich in iron ore deposits.

questions.question: Which of the following is a Fundamental Right?
questions.explanation: Right to Equality is a Fundamental Right under Indian Constitution.

questions.question: Who is the current Speaker of the Lok Sabha?
questions.explanation: Om Birla is the current Speaker of the Lok Sabha.

questions.question: The President of India is elected by?
questions.explanation: The President is elected by an Electoral College consisting of elected members of Parliament and State Assemblies.

questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution deals with the Directive Principles of State Policy?
questions.explanation: Article 37 states that the Directive Principles are fundamental in the governance of the country but are non-justiciable.

questions.question: Which particle is responsible for carrying current in a metallic conductor?
questions.explanation: Electrons carry current in metallic conductors.

questions.question: Which gas is most abundant in the Earth’s atmosphere?
questions.explanation: Nitrogen makes up about 78% of the Earth's atmosphere.

questions.question: Which vitamin is primarily obtained from sunlight?
questions.explanation: Vitamin D is synthesized in the skin when exposed to sunlight.

questions.question: Which disease is caused by deficiency of Vitamin C?
questions.explanation: Scurvy is caused by Vitamin C deficiency.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 2, 4, 8, 16, ?
questions.explanation: The series doubles each time, so the next number is 32.

questions.question: If in a certain code, 'ODISHA' is written as 'NCHRGZ', how is 'ODIA' written?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted backward by 1 in the code.

questions.question: Blood relations: Pointing to a man, Rina says, 'He is the son of my grandfather's son'. How is the man related to Rina?
questions.explanation: He is Rina's father, as he is the son of her grandfather's son.

questions.question: In which direction is the train moving if it is heading west and then turns to the right?
questions.explanation: Turning right while heading west points south.

questions.question: Who is the current President of India?
questions.explanation: Droupadi Murmu has been the President of India since 25 July 2022.

questions.question: Which scheme was launched to promote rural employment in India?
questions.explanation: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act) promotes rural employment.

questions.question: Which award was recently conferred upon Odisha for its outstanding performance in sports?
questions.explanation: Odisha athletes have received Arjuna Awards for excellence in sports.

questions.question: Who is the current External Affairs Minister of India?
questions.explanation: S. Jaishankar is the current External Affairs Minister of India.
